expectations.text: Screen 1 MUST contain a NavigationList and NO other components (exclusive component rule).
expectations.evidence: SCREEN_ONE contains only the NavigationList component.

expectations.text: Screen 2 MUST include a Footer component as it is a terminal screen.
expectations.evidence: SCREEN_TWO includes a Footer with a complete action.

expectations.text: The flow.json MUST include 'data_exchange_trigger' if data_exchange is used.
